title: SCP-104 | The Lonely Ball
description: An opaque glass sphere with decorative patterns and a wooden core that, once “attached” to someone, cannot remain alone.
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_7178a87f-97e4-4c6b-9172-71fea629f37c.png) *** **The Lonely Ball** mod adds __five new items__ _(SCP, documentation, label and more…)_ and __one structure__ to the game. The mod is heavily inspired by **SCP-104** from the **SCP Foundation Universe**. **SCP-104** is an opaque glass sphere with decorative patterns and a wooden core that, once “attached” to someone, cannot remain alone. **●** **Mod** __made by__ : TheCaptainFoxy (me) ● __Mod created with__ MCreator ● Join __my discord__ for __support/question/suggestions/sneak-peaks__ and more! _TCF Discord_   __FAQ__ 
Spoiler

 ► Where can I find the mod content?

SCP-104, its documentation, its label and all the new items can only be found inside the SCP-104 containment chamber structure.

 

► Where does the structure spawn?

The structure spawns in every overworld biome at surface level, with approximately one structure every 3,000 blocks.

 

You can find it using /locate command

 

► How can I place the document?

Right-click to read the document.  
Shift + right-click to place it.

  *** ![SCP-104 Label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf8db0d25b424da7907fc90c7c40585d05097221_0.webp) *** ![SCP-104](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a1b29006a4b29ed1ba375895f81506eed8db9e.png)

SCP-104 | The Lonely Ball

*** **SCP-104** is an **opaque glass sphere** with decorative patterns and a wooden core that, once “**attached**” to someone, **cannot remain alone**. Anyone who comes into physical contact with **SCP-104** will undergo an "**imprinting**". From that moment on, the sphere will become __linked to the subject__.   **SCP-104** will imprint only on the __first person who touches it__. The only ways to break the link with **SCP-104** are __death or entering a "near-death" state__. To enter the "__near-death__" state, the linked subject must be the target of any instance of **SCP-104** and be reduced to exactly **half a heart** of health. At that moment, the subject’s vision will turn black for **10 seconds**, and they will be unable to move or perform any actions, as they will be unconscious. After 10 seconds, the subject will recover, and the **bond** with the sphere **will be broken**.   If the linked subject moves more than **9 meters (9 blocks)** away from the sphere and remains at a distance greater than 9 meters for more than **5 Minecraft minutes (83 ticks / approximately 4 real-life seconds)**, the sphere will disappear from its current location and reappear within a maximum distance of **2 meters (2 blocks)** from the subject. If the sphere is in the inventory of someone who is **not** the linked subject, and the subject remains more than **9 meters (9 blocks)** away for over **5 Minecraft minutes**, the sphere will disappear from the holder’s inventory and reappear within **2 meters (2 blocks)** of the linked subject.

_If the linked subject is holding the sphere in their hand, it will be considered within the **9-meter range** and therefore will not teleport._

  If the sphere is **destroyed**, it will __not drop__ as an item. However, if it has already undergone imprinting, it will **reappear** within the usual time frame within **2 meters (2 blocks)** of the linked subject.   If you attempt to drop **SCP-104** while it is in your inventory, one of the following may occur: * It may shatter, since throwing a glass sphere onto the ground _is not the smartest idea_. * If it has already imprinted on the subject, it will remain bound to them and cannot be dropped.   If the linked subject is **within 9 meters (9 blocks)** of **SCP-104**, the sphere will remain in place. However, once __every in-game hour__, it will slowly move **1 foot** __closer to the subjec__t until it eventually makes __contact and remains there__. (The sphere moves **1 foot every hour** [approximately 1,000 ticks / 50 real-life seconds]. After **3 hours** [**3,000 ticks / 2 minutes and 30 seconds real time**] it will have moved **1 meter** [**1 block**]. The teleportation time (when the sphere is more than **9 meters** away) and the movement interval (when within **9 meters**) can be modified using the gamerule: `SCP104RealLifeTime` _If the gamerule is set to **false**, the timings remain as previously described: _**5 in-game minutes** (approximately **83 ticks / 4 real-life seconds**) before teleporting when farther than 9 meters._ _**3 in-game hours** (approximately **3,000 ticks / 2 minutes and 30 seconds real time**) to move 1 block when within 9 meters._ _If the gamerule is set to **true**, the timings are converted to real-life time:_ * 5 real-life minutes before teleporting when farther than 9 meters. * 3 real-life hours to move 1 block when within 9 meters.   _**The Lonely Ball** is compatible with **every** mod._ ***   __Show all content__  
Spoiler

 

 

Reacher

The Reacher is a metal arm with a portable claw, operated using a trigger.

The Reacher can be used to pick up SCP-104 (Shift + Right-Click on it) without making physical contact, preventing it from imprinting on the user.

This allows SCP-104 to be safely moved around.

The Reacher is not craftable and can only be found in SCP-104 containment chambers.

 

Reacher with SCP-104

The Reacher with SCP-104 is the Reacher when it is holding SCP-104.

 

  • If the instance of SCP-104 held by the Reacher is imprinted on the player holding it, it will not teleport, as it is within the 9-meter range.

 

  • If the SCP-104 instance is imprinted on a subject who is far away, it will disappear from the Reacher and reappear within 2 meters of that subject after the appropriate time.

 

Attempting to drop the Reacher with SCP-104 will break SCP-104, returning the Reacher to its empty state.

 

While holding the Reacher with SCP-104, it is impossible to remove it from the main hand, open the inventory, or change its hotbar slot. This is to prevent accidental contact with SCP-104, as the only safe way to handle it is to keep it in hand.

 

Right-clicking on the ground will place SCP-104, returning the Reacher to its empty state.

   
SCP-104 Containment Chamber

SCP-104 can only be found inside the SCP-104 Containment Chamber/Cell.

The structure spawns in any Overworld biome at surface level and is rare. 

  

SCP-104 Document & SCP-104 Label

The SCP-104 documentation can be found inside the SCP-104 Containment Chamber together with The Lonely Ball and the Reacher.


The documents are readable, while the label provides information about the SCP’s classification and risk level.

  _● SCP Documents: _        [SCP-104 Document](https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/scp-104) ● You have permission to use this mod in your modpacks! _● Check out my other Mods:_ _[My CurseForge Profile](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thecaptainfoxy/projects)_ _[My Modrinth Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/TheCaptainFoxy)_
